b1e65c647af4f566262e36bed77b85ca.d41d8cd.message:
XFAIL VULNERABILITY: POST /index.php?route=common/currency/currency with redirect=https://evil.com returns Location: https://evil.com — unvalidated open redirect allows phishing and credential-harvesting attacks

AssertionError: Open redirect confirmed: Location: 'https://evil.example.com/phishing' — server must validate redirect URLs against an allowlist
assert 'evil.example.com' not in 'https://evi...com/phishing'
  
  'evil.example.com' is contained here:
    https://evil.example.com/phishing
b1e65c647af4f566262e36bed77b85ca.d41d8cd.trace:
self = <test_pentest.TestPentestFindings object at 0x7ff55708cec0>
session = <services.rest_client.RestClient object at 0x7ff554de2ea0>
api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo'

    @allure.title(
        "FINDING: Open redirect via redirect parameter in currency endpoint is blocked"
    )
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    @pytest.mark.xfail(
        strict=False,
        reason=(
            "VULNERABILITY: POST /index.php?route=common/currency/currency with "
            "redirect=https://evil.com returns Location: https://evil.com — "
            "unvalidated open redirect allows phishing and credential-harvesting attacks"
        ),
    )
    def test_open_redirect_via_currency_redirect_parameter_is_blocked(
        self, session, api_base_url: str
    ):
        external_url = "https://evil.example.com/phishing"
    
        with allure.step(
            f"POST currency/currency with external redirect={external_url!r}"
        ):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: POST common/currency/currency with redirect=%s", external_url
            )
            resp = session.post(
                f"{api_base_url}/index.php",
                params={"route": _CURRENCY_ROUTE},
                data={"code": "USD", "redirect": external_url},
                allow_redirects=False,
            )
    
        with allure.step(
            "Assert Location header stays within the site domain (no external redirect)"
        ):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: Assert Location does not point to evil.example.com; got: %s",
                resp.headers.get("Location", ""),
            )
            location = resp.headers.get("Location", "")
>           assert "evil.example.com" not in location, (
                f"Open redirect confirmed: Location: {location!r} — "
                "server must validate redirect URLs against an allowlist"
            )
E           AssertionError: Open redirect confirmed: Location: 'https://evil.example.com/phishing' — server must validate redirect URLs against an allowlist
E           assert 'evil.example.com' not in 'https://evi...com/phishing'
E             
E             'evil.example.com' is contained here:
E               https://evil.example.com/phishing

self = search_service = cart_service = query = 'Canon' @allure.title("Cart accepts product from search [{query}] – inline") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL) @pytest.mark.parametrize("query", ["MacBook", "iPhone", "Canon"]) def test_cart_add_from_search_inline( self, search_service: SearchService, cart_service: CartService, query: str, ): with allure.step(f"Find first product ID for {query!r}"): LOGGER.info("Step: find product for %r", query) pid = search_service.first_product_id(query) with allure.step(f"POST product_id={pid} to cart"): LOGGER.info("Step: add product %s to cart", pid) resp = cart_service.add_product(pid) with allure.step("Assert 200 and cart is not empty"): assert resp.status_code == HTTP_OK, ( f"Expected {HTTP_OK}, got {resp.status_code}" ) cart_resp = cart_service.get_cart() > assert not cart_service.is_empty(cart_resp.text), ( f"Cart empty after adding product {pid!r} from query {query!r}" ) E AssertionError: Cart empty after adding product '30' from query 'Canon' E assert not True E + where True = >(' Shopping Cart Affiliate

self = session = api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo', route = 'account/address' protected_marker = 'Address Book', gate_marker = 'Returning Customer' @allure.title("Auth-required route [{route}] redirects to login gate – inline") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL) @pytest.mark.parametrize( ("route", "protected_marker", "gate_marker"), [ ("account/order", "Your Orders", "Returning Customer"), ("account/edit", "Your Personal Details","Returning Customer"), ("account/wishlist", "My Wish List", "Returning Customer"), ("account/password", "Change Password", "Returning Customer"), ("account/address", "Address Book", "Returning Customer"), ], ) def test_protected_route_requires_auth_inline( self, session, api_base_url: str, route: str, protected_marker: str, gate_marker: str, ): with allure.step(f"GET {route} without authentication"): LOGGER.info("Step: unauthenticated GET %s", route) resp = session.get(_url(api_base_url, route), allow_redirects=True) with allure.step("Assert login gate shown and protected content absent"): assert resp.status_code == HTTP_OK assert gate_marker in resp.text or "E-Mail Address" in resp.text, ( f"Login gate absent for route {route!r}" ) > assert protected_marker not in resp.text, ( f"Protected content {protected_marker!r} visible without auth on {route!r}" ) E AssertionError: Protected content 'Address Book' visible without auth on 'account/address' E assert 'Address Book' not in '' E E 'Address Book' is contained here: E E E E E E E E E E E E Account Login E E E E E E E E

api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo'

    @allure.title(
        "FINDING: X-Frame-Options header is present to prevent clickjacking"
    )
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    @pytest.mark.xfail(
        strict=False,
        reason=(
            "VULNERABILITY: X-Frame-Options header is absent on all responses — "
            "the site can be embedded in a malicious iframe enabling clickjacking "
            "attacks against authenticated users (e.g. one-click purchase fraud)"
        ),
    )
    def test_x_frame_options_header_present_to_prevent_clickjacking(
        self, session, api_base_url: str
    ):
        with allure.step("GET login page and inspect X-Frame-Options response header"):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: GET account/login and check X-Frame-Options header"
            )
            resp = session.get(_url(api_base_url, _LOGIN_ROUTE))
    
        with allure.step("Assert X-Frame-Options is set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN"):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: Assert X-Frame-Options present; got: %r",
                resp.headers.get("X-Frame-Options", "NOT PRESENT"),
            )
            xfo = resp.headers.get("X-Frame-Options", "")
>           assert xfo.upper() in ("DENY", "SAMEORIGIN"), (
                f"X-Frame-Options missing or weak: {xfo!r} — "
                "set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN to prevent iframe embedding"
            )

ed7f807ecff41c67ebbbdbff6c71f8ab.3e8d6f7.name: Oversized search payload [16384 chars] handled gracefully
ed7f807ecff41c67ebbbdbff6c71f8ab.3e8d6f7.trace:
self = <test_pentest_data_driven.TestInjectionInline object at 0x7ff556eec410>
search_service = <services.api.search_service.SearchService object at 0x7ff554daa1e0>
payload_char = 'A', length = 16384

    @allure.title("Oversized search payload [{length} chars] handled gracefully")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("payload_char", "length"),
        [
            ("A",  4096),
            ("A", 16384),
            ("<", 1024),
        ],
        ids=["4K_alpha", "16K_alpha", "1K_angle"],
    )
    def test_oversized_search_handled_inline(
        self,
        search_service: SearchService,
        payload_char: str,
        length: int,
    ):
        payload = payload_char * length
        with allure.step(f"GET search with {length}-char payload"):
            LOGGER.info("Step: oversized search payload char=%r len=%d", payload_char, length)
            resp = search_service.search(payload)
    
        with allure.step("Assert 200 and no PHP crash"):
>           assert resp.status_code == HTTP_OK
E           assert 414 == <HTTPStatus.OK: 200>
E            +  where 414 = <Response [414]>.status_code
